query:
ALTER TABLE property_tours
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeTitle TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeDescription TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeTags TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeTimestamps TEXT;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4EPJgiEgR66ZdqB.d6c59bab5a06 --database K9BXxKfRk2PJ2AbRYdraAT --execute ALTER TABLE property_tours
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeTitle TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeDescription TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeTags TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS youtubeTimestamps TEXT;
